title: adenia heterophylla subsp. heterophylla
intro: Adenia heterophylla subsp. heterophylla, also known as the African potato or wild potato, is a species of plant in the family Passifloraceae, characterized by its edible tubers and medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Adenia heterophylla subsp. heterophylla include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
